data.content: Plan is to add content-drift detection for managed skills by comparing deployed `SKILL.md` files in the preferred tool root against `render_skill()` output, update doctor messaging for missing versus drifted files, and align the `skills_*` doctor fix path so stale files can be reconciled instead of only installing missing ones. Expected touch points are `src/managed_skills.rs`, `src/managed_skills_output.rs`, `src/managed_skills_tests.rs`, and `tests/cli_skills.rs`, with care to keep `src/managed_skills.rs` under the 500-line limit. Validate with targeted managed-skills and CLI tests, then `make sanity`.
